calendar.matters:
Petition For Order To Terminate Exemption Trust Due To Changed Circumstances And Upon Consent Of All Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Feb-13-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Karolyn Poppin for petitioner Joan Jeong.

Ms. Poppin stated that subsequent to the creation of the bypass trust, changes in tax law have made it unnecessary, and that the petitioner desired to terminate the unfunded bypss trust and just proceed with the survivor's trust. She said that the two contingent beneficiaries of the bypass trust were adult children of the petitioner who consented to elimination of the bypass trust, as doing so would minimize administration costs and leave more money available for the needs of their mother. Ms. Poppin confirmed that notice went out to all beneficiaries. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)
